hero.subheadline: Connect your gateway in 2 minutes and see exactly where every dollar comes from — channel, campaign, landing page and real margin. Works with info-products, SaaS, e-commerce and any digital business.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card · Free up to $3k/month in revenue

problem.label: // the problem
problem.description: Revenue scattered across Kiwify, Hotmart, Stripe, Asaas and other gateways. Costs in a spreadsheet. Acquisition in Google Analytics. Nothing talks to each other — and you discover your real margin a month late, if you ever do.

items.title: Gateway Dashboard
items.desc: Shows what came in. Not where it came from, what it cost to acquire, or whether you actually made a profit.

items.title: Spreadsheets
items.desc: You update it on Friday. By Monday it's already wrong. And when a formula breaks, nobody knows how long it's been broken.

items.title: Google Analytics
items.desc: You know how many sessions came from Google. You don't know if any of them paid.

problem.solutionDesc: One script. One webhook. Funnel → MRR → channels → costs → real margin → AI — all together, in real time. Just you and the numbers that matter.

items.title: Overview
items.desc: Real-time funnel, KPIs with vs. prior period delta and daily chart. See visits → sign-ups → checkouts → revenue in one screen.

items.title: Recurring Revenue (MRR)
items.desc: MRR, ARR, ARPU, LTV, Churn Rate, Revenue Churn. Subscriber flow Sankey and movement chart: New / Expansion / Contraction / Churn.

items.title: Financials
items.desc: Gross revenue, net revenue, discounts and average ticket. Breakdown by payment method (card, bank transfer) and product category.

items.title: Costs & P&L
items.desc: Add fixed and variable costs (absolute or % of revenue). Real-time P&L: Gross Revenue → Gross Profit → Net Profit → Real Margin.

items.title: Acquisition Channels
items.desc: Revenue, funnel stages, conversion rate and average ticket by source. Visual heatmap and sortable table by any column.

items.title: Landing Pages
items.desc: Which entry pages generate the most revenue? Full funnel metrics by URL, with search, sorting and pagination.

items.title: Events & Debug
items.desc: Real-time event table. Filter by type, billing model, date. Automatic alerts for IDs missing deduplication.

items.title: Subscriptions
items.desc: Active, in trial, past due, canceled — with plan, interval, normalized monthly value and customer ID. Full history.

items.title: Period Comparison
items.desc: Compare two date ranges — overview, channels, financials or landing pages. Side by side or AI summary.

code.label: // setup
code.description: One script tag for funnel and acquisition. One webhook for payments and subscriptions. No backend changes.

steps.title: Add the script tag
steps.desc: Add one line in your <head> with your API Key. Pageviews, UTMs, device and session are tracked automatically.

steps.title: Track funnel events
steps.desc: Call Groware.track() on sign-up, checkout and payment events. The SDK is < 3 kB.

steps.title: Connect your gateway
steps.desc: Paste your gateway key (Stripe, Kiwify, Hotmart, Asaas...). Groware imports the full history and starts receiving webhooks automatically.

integrations.label: // integrations
integrations.description: Native gateway integrations do the heavy lifting. History sync, real-time webhooks and conversion attribution built in.

items.name: Stripe
items.desc: Global payments and subscriptions.

items.name: Asaas
items.desc: Brazilian gateway with Pix and bank slip.

items.name: Kiwify
items.desc: Info-products and online courses.

items.name: Hotmart
items.desc: Digital products platform.

items.name: Mercado Pago
items.desc: Payments and transparent checkout.

items.name: Pagar.me
items.desc: Payment gateway for SaaS.

items.name: Monetizze
items.desc: Affiliate and digital products platform.

items.name: PagBank
items.desc: Payments and PagSeguro checkout.

items.name: Guru
items.desc: Checkout and digital sales management.

items.name: PayPal
items.desc: Global payments and international checkout.

items.name: Eduzz
items.desc: Info-products and affiliate platform.

items.name: Cakto
items.desc: Checkout and digital product sales.

items.name: Kirvano
items.desc: Digital sales platform.

items.name: Abacate Pay
items.desc: Pix payments and simplified checkout.

items.name: tracker.js
items.desc: Your universal fallback. Works with any checkout. < 3 kB, zero dependencies, auto-tracking.

items.name: Gemini AI
items.desc: Powered by Google Gemini. Analyzes P&L + funnel + channels + recurring revenue. Real-time streaming.

items.name: REST API
items.desc: Send server-side events from any language. Node, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP — any stack.

ai.label: // ai analysis
ai.description: Click "Analyze with AI" on the Costs screen and Groware sends your full P&L, funnel and channels to Gemini — returning prioritized insights with real-time streaming.
ai.panelSub: Gemini analyzes your costs and identifies opportunities

features.title: Real business context
features.desc: AI receives detailed P&L (fixed, variable, margins), funnel with conversion rates, average ticket and organization name.

features.title: Period comparison
features.desc: Compare two date ranges with AI analysis. Understand what changed between periods with a clear, structured response.

features.title: Real-time streaming
features.desc: The response arrives fragment by fragment, directly in the dashboard. Blinking cursor while the AI thinks.

ai.mockupDiagnosisLine: Your real margin of <highlight>61.6%</highlight> is <above>above average</above> for digital businesses.
ai.mockupOp2: Gateway fee <warn>$4,200</warn> → compare costs across gateways.
ai.mockupRec1: 1. Negotiate processing fee with your gateway

metrics.label: // revenue attribution
metrics.description: Each payment is attributed to its acquisition source — even payments made via gateway webhook, months after the first click.
metrics.tableSub: 5 channels with revenue · sorted by revenue

ctaSection.description: Connect your favorite gateway, install the tracker and see where every dollar of your revenue comes from — channel, campaign, real margin. In under 5 minutes.
ctaSection.disclaimer: No credit card · Free up to $3k/month in revenue · 5-minute setup
